_comment: Copy this to gmail_auth.json (which is gitignored and never committed) and paste each account's Google App Password from myaccount.google.com/apppasswords - NOT the normal password. An account whose app_password still starts with PASTE is skipped, not fatal, so you can warm accounts up one at a time. Per account: 'segments' is the list of drip segments that mailbox owns (a thread never changes sender, so keep these stable once threads exist); 'daily_cap' overrides the 20/day default; 'warm_start' (YYYY-MM-DD, the day the mailbox began sending) holds a brand-new account to 8/day for its first week, then it rises to its cap on its own.
